statement: In every magma, Equation 2431 (`x = (y * (z * (w * w))) * y`) implies Equation 2705 (`x = ((y * x) * (x * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0597
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w w))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op x z)) w)
